title: Trump Says He Doesn't Want Ceasefire With Iran
summary_full: US President Donald Trump on Friday ruled out reaching a ceasefire agreement with Iran, saying Washington has the upper hand in the three-week-old war.
summary_public: US President Donald Trump on Friday ruled out reaching a ceasefire agreement with Iran, saying Washington has the upper hand in the three-week-old war.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump Says He Doesn't Want Ceasefire With Iran
